name: Blue Owl Capital
confidenceReason: Fee-heavy, permanent capital model with high dividend yield. FRE-based earnings growing 15%+ but GAAP EPS heavily distorted by amortization of acquired intangibles.
bullCase: Permanent capital base means zero redemption risk. Growing GP stakes and direct lending businesses provide durable, fee-based revenue. Massive dividend yield with room for payout growth as FRE scales.
bearCase: GAAP profitability is minimal due to heavy intangible amortization from acquisitions. Private credit cycle stress could impair portfolio yields. Share dilution from equity-funded acquisitions.

cagrModel.basis: FRE per share; permanent capital model with fee-heavy earnings
